candidates.title: ConSERT: A Contrastive Framework for Self-Supervised Sentence Representation Transfer

candidate_ranking.rationale: The fallback title search and alternate DOI resolver both identify the ACL 2021 ConSERT paper.

final_decision.rationale: The DOI was broken in the raw citation. Crossref recovered the correct work and OpenAlex confirmed the corrected DOI.

candidates.title: Sentence-BERT: Sentence Embeddings using Siamese BERT-Networks

candidate_ranking.rationale: After the DOI lookup failed, the fallback searches produced unrelated or weak BERT-like matches rather than a stable recovery of the NAACL 2019 paper.

final_decision.rationale: The DOI failed and the fallback search results remained ambiguous, so correcting the citation would risk fabricating support.

parsed_fields.title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding

proposed_query.query: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding Devlin 2019

suspected_issues.rationale: The title begins with a very short acronym-like token, which makes fallback search results noisy after DOI failure.
The DOI does not resolve, and short-title retrieval can easily over-correct to an unrelated BERT paper.
